response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified narrative segments (comic strip style) and a musical performance segment. 2. Identified the song 'Cubism' (きゅびずむ) from on-screen text during the performance (00:58). 3. Identified the composer as 原口沙輔 (Sasuke Haraguchi) and lyricist as にゃるら (Nyarura) via on-screen text and confirmed with web search. 4. Searched for lyrics using 'きゅびずむ 原口沙輔 lyrics'. 5. Compiled the lyrics snippet found for the song performance scene. 6. Mapped scenes to timestamps and structured the final JSON.
response.global_summary: The video depicts a narrative sequence involving two VTubers, Ninomae Ina'nis and Anya Melfissa, which transitions into a musical performance of the song 'Cubism' (きゅびずむ), and then returns to the narrative sequence.

scenes.description: A comic strip-style sequence featuring Ninomae Ina'nis and Anya Melfissa discussing a case. No music is playing.
A musical performance by Ninomae Ina'nis and Anya Melfissa of the song 'Cubism'. On-screen text credits 'Lyrics: にゃるら' and 'Music: 原口沙輔'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
大きな白いキャンバスに
虚構のコラージュを貼るよ
どこからでもキレイに映る
誇張された天使が居たよ
薔薇 人歪んだ 正しくなくても見えた
生きるため立ち寄った美術館のセザンヌに
なんもわかんないな
まだ知らずにいても描けた
赤ずっと塗り込んだ
バカ
きっと...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
On a large white canvas
I paste a collage of fiction
映る (reflecting) beautifully from anywhere
There was an exaggerated angel
Rose, distorted, visible even when not right
In Cezanne at the art museum I dropped by to live
I don't understand anything
I could draw it without knowing yet
I painted it red for a long time
Idiot
Surely...

scenes.description: The narrative sequence continues with text bubbles between Ninomae Ina'nis and Anya Melfissa. No music is playing.
